title: uva-ursi uva-ursi
intro: Uva-ursi uva-ursi, also known as bearberry or arctostaphylos uva-ursi, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the boreal forests of North America, Europe, and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in treating urinary tract infections and bladder problems. The health benefits of uva-ursi include reducing inflammation and fighting off bacterial and fungal infections, making it a popular herbal remedy for urinary issues and skin conditions. Uva-ursi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, although it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
